profile_backed_target.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- --quiet

focused_baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_scan/functional_sub_jaxpr_add_emit_128x64 --quiet

candidate_rebench.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-dispatch --bench dispatch_baseline -- vmap_scan/functional_sub_jaxpr_add_emit_128x64 --quiet

one_lever: Specialize the exact no-const one-carry I64 functional scan body `carry + x -> carry; carry + 0 -> y` into a row-major segmented prefix scan.

alien_primitive.adaptation: The vmap scan batch is represented as independent row segments and evaluated as per-row prefix scans without per-step scalar sub-jaxpr materialization.

isomorphism.ordering: Forward visits scan_idx ascending; reverse visits descending but writes each y to its original input-order slot, matching the generic reverse scan output order.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: Not applicable: the scan body has no conflicts, sorting, comparisons, or scatter updates.
isomorphism.floating_point: Identical by exclusion: the direct path accepts only DType::I64 rank-2 xs; FP inputs fall back to generic scan evaluation.
isomorphism.integer_overflow: Uses wrapping_add, matching the existing I64 Add semantics; a golden test pins i64::MAX + 1 + 2.
isomorphism.rng: Unchanged: no RNG primitive, seed, or state is read or written.
isomorphism.fallback: Any non-exact body shape, constvar, effect, params, nested sub-jaxpr, non-I64 input, non-rank2 input, or multi-carry scan returns None and uses the existing generic path.

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-dispatch scan_sub_jaxprs -- --nocapture
validation.result: passed 4 focused scan tests including forward, reverse, wrapping, and multi-carry fallback
passed 245 unit tests, 55 integration tests, and doctests

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-dispatch --all-targets --no-deps -- -D warnings

validation.result: exit 0; critical issues 0; warning inventory unchanged at file scope

notes: Shared peer edits in fj-core/fj-lax were present in the worktree during validation and are not part of this staged lever.
